strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with diverse technical leadership across embedded, web, mobile, and infrastructure domains; multiple Staff Engineer roles demonstrate seniority
Currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing active involvement in cutting-edge AI platform development
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and mentoring capability through founding GISCollective, open-source contributions, and technical workshop delivery
concerns: No prior AI/ML expertise in career history—resume lacks machine learning projects, AI platforms, or deep learning work before April 2025
Missing preferred qualification of Master's or PhD in AI field; holds undergraduate CS degree but no specialized AI education
Recent AI involvement (14 months) insufficient to establish 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' as explicitly required
response.justification: Candidate demonstrates strong engineering leadership credentials exceeding baseline requirements, with documented technical depth and multiple Staff-level roles across diverse domains. However, the role explicitly requires a Principal Engineer specialized in AI with recognized expertise and demonstrated AI products—core differentiators for this position. The resume shows no prior AI/ML background, lacks the preferred advanced degree in AI, and current AI work spans only ~14 months, insufficient to establish the deep AI specialization this director-level strategy role demands. While recent AI engagement suggests positive trajectory, there is a significant expertise gap relative to stated requirements.
